tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 2 before 100
    move 3 before 100
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 2 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 3 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DNS8853-Allow-Approved"
        set uuid 6e88fc28-335e-51f1-870b-3b3ce8b49a40
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "DNS-Approved-Host"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "DNS8853-Deny-Ubuntu"
        set uuid 6e9bf300-335e-51f1-09ab-15cce80e11db
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
